title: Las Vegas Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Las Vegas, with a Z-Score of +4.14. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Las Vegas is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 13.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is very low at 7%, exacerbating the heat. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 24.8 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to protect the public and infrastructure.
